1: By deconstructing complex problems into a sequence of simpler, more manageable
2: sub-tasks, prompt chaining provides a robust framework for guiding large language
3: models. This "divide-and-conquer" strategy significantly enhances the reliability and
4: control of the output by focusing the model on one specific operation at a time. As a
5: foundational pattern, it enables the development of sophisticated AI agents capable of
6: multi-step reasoning, tool integration, and state management. Ultimately, mastering
7: prompt chaining is crucial for building robust, context-aware systems that can execute
8: intricate workflows well beyond the capabilities of a single prompt.
